synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20954 Important: Oracle Linux 9 sssd security update
description:
[2.9.7-4.0.1.1]
- Restore default debug level for sss_cache [Orabug: 32810448]

* Fri Oct 17 2025 Tomas Halman <thalman at redhat.com - 2.9.7.4.1
- Resolves: RHEL-120298 - CVE-2025-11561 sssd: SSSD default Kerberos configuration allows privilege escalation
  on AD-joined Linux systems
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20954

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20954.html
